title: Cobbromon
description: This modpack blends the creature-collecting adventure of Cobblemon with the mechanical creativity of Create. Explore the world, build clever contraptions, and grow your team—all in a seamless mix of exploration and engineering.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f007defc4833f38f58ea00e9a1672d81c7efe62c.png)

## The Official Cobbromon Server Modpack

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/312429934ff06caf4dab27db7453fb0d28a35b45.png)

This modpack combines the creature-collecting fun of Cobblemon with the mechanical creativity of Create to deliver a fresh, adventure-driven Minecraft experience. Explore the world while discovering, training, and battling Cobblemon, then bring your journey to life with fully automated factories, intricate contraptions, and kinetic machinery. Whether you're building advanced bases, engineering complex systems, or forming your ultimate Cobblemon team, this pack blends exploration and engineering into one seamless, immersive world.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/312429934ff06caf4dab27db7453fb0d28a35b45.png)
